AHA 30% + BHA 2% Peeling Solution exfoliates multiple layers of the skin for a brighter, more even appearance. This formula contains an extremely high concentration of free acids. We recommend use only if you are an experienced user of acid exfoliation and your skin is not sensitive.

This serum also contains niacinamide, which is known for its brightening properties, as well as adenosine, which helps to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.Overall, I'm From Rice Serum is designed to provide the skin with a boost of hydration while brightening and improving the skin's texture and tone.

Brightening: Rice is known for its brightening properties, which can help even out skin tone and reduce the appearance of dark spots and hyperpigmentation.

Nourishing: The serum is packed with vitamins, minerals, and amino acids that can help to nourish and strengthen the skin, leaving it healthier and more radiant.
